deep_dive.title: PnP-IPA: A Provably Convergent Plug-and-Play Inexact Proximal Algorithm for Nonconvex Imaging Problems
deep_dive.abstract: Plug-and-Play (PnP) methods have emerged as a highly effective paradigm for solving imaging inverse problems by replacing traditional proximity operators of regularization terms with highly expressive deep denoisers. While empirically successful, establishing rigorous convergence guarantees for PnP algorithms remains a major challenge. Existing provable approaches based on the Gradient-Step (GS) denoiser suffer from theoretical and practical limitations, such as restrictive bounds on the regularization parameter, rigid step-size rules, and the inability to handle nonconvex data-fidelity terms. In this paper, we introduce PnP-IPA (Plug-and-Play Inexact Proximal Algorithm), a novel optimization scheme that overcomes these bottlenecks. We propose a new splitting strategy that evaluates the proximal operator of the scaled implicit regularizer inexactly. To enable adaptive step-size selection without exact objective evaluations, we design a novel surrogate merit function that successfully drives an Armijo-like backtracking line-search. Relying on the Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz property, we establish global convergence to a stationary point of the nonconvex objective without imposing any assumption on the regularization parameter. Extensive numerical experiments on image deblurring under both Gaussian and Cauchy noise demonstrate the practical advantages of PnP-IPA. By effectively lifting previous theoretical constraints, our method allows for optimal parameter tuning, yielding state-of-the-art restoration quality and robust convergence even in nonconvex regimes.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: plug-and-play denoising algorithm for imaging inverse problems
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 即插即用去噪算法用于成像逆问题
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 即插即用去噪算法用于成像逆问题
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 即插即用去噪算法用于成像逆问题
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a provably convergent plug-and-play algorithm (PnP-IPA) for nonconvex imaging problems, using deep denoisers as priors with flexible step-size rules.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对成像逆问题中即插即用（PnP）方法收敛性难以保证的挑战，提出了一种新型优化方案PnP-IPA。该方法将深度去噪器显式作为先验，采用不精确近端算法，在非凸数据保真项下提供了严格的收敛保证，且不限制正则化参数和步长。实验表明，PnP-IPA在多种图像恢复任务中性能优异，并可直接推广至高光谱图像去噪。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对成像逆问题中即插即用（PnP）方法收敛性难以保证的挑战，提出了一种新型优化方案PnP-IPA。该方法将深度去噪器显式作为先验，采用不精确近端算法，在非凸数据保真项下提供了严格的收敛保证，且不限制正则化参数和步长。实验表明，PnP-IPA在多种图像恢复任务中性能优异，并可直接推广至高光谱图像去噪。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: state of the art hyperspectral image restoration and denoising methods

quick_skim.title: SLORR: Simple and Efficient In-Training Low-Rank Regularization
quick_skim.abstract: Low-rank factorization is widely used to compress neural networks, but modern models are often not naturally amenable to aggressive factorization without significant accuracy loss. Existing training-time low-rank regularizers can improve compressibility, but they often require SVDs of large weight matrices, modify the model architecture (introducing additional trainable parameters), or rely on stateful cached quantities. To address these limitations, we introduce SLORR, a simple, stateless, and architecture-preserving framework for in-training low-rank regularization, instantiated with two main variants based on the Hoyer sparsity metric and the nuclear norm. SLORR directly regularizes the original weight matrices using GPU-friendly approximations for the forward and backward passes of the regularizers, for which we provide approximation guarantees. We first evaluate SLORR on ImageNet-1K across short-horizon continued training of ResNet-50, ViT-B/16, and ViT-L/16, and pretraining of ResNet-18, where SLORR induces compressibility while introducing less than 8% training overhead. We further evaluate SLORR-Hoyer in LLM pretraining at 135M and 560M scales: SLORR-trained compressed models preserve performance substantially better than unregularized models while adding less than 1% average training overhead.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SLORR proposes a simple stateless low-rank regularization method that directly regularizes weight matrices using GPU-friendly approximations, aiding compressibility. This technique is transferable to low-rank representation denoising in hyperspectral images.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有训练时低秩正则化方法需要奇异值分解、修改架构或缓存状态的问题，本文提出SLORR框架，通过基于Hoyer稀疏度和核范数的两种变体，对原始权重矩阵进行GPU友好的近似正则化，无需额外参数或架构改动。实验表明该方法在保持精度的同时显著提升模型可压缩性。该技术可直接迁移至高光谱图像低秩表示去噪任务，作为正则化工具提升去噪性能。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有训练时低秩正则化方法需要奇异值分解、修改架构或缓存状态的问题，本文提出SLORR框架，通过基于Hoyer稀疏度和核范数的两种变体，对原始权重矩阵进行GPU友好的近似正则化，无需额外参数或架构改动。实验表明该方法在保持精度的同时显著提升模型可压缩性。该技术可直接迁移至高光谱图像低秩表示去噪任务，作为正则化工具提升去噪性能。

quick_skim.title: Coupled Tensor-Matrix Recovery via Proximal Alternating Linearized Minimization, with an Application to Workforce Skill and Small-Business Health Estimation
quick_skim.abstract: We study recovery of a low-rank tensor $\mathcal{T}$ and a low-rank matrix $M$ from sparse, noisy observations. $\mathcal{T}$ and $M$ share one mode. We relax tensor rank using the nuclear norm of the mode-1 unfolding. This unfolding carries the coupling. It also has an exact proximal operator. We couple $\mathcal{T}$ and $M$ through a learned linear operator $G$. We prove a minimizer exists for the ridge-stabilized penalized objective. We prove that a proximal alternating linearized minimization (PALM) scheme converges to a critical point, for the algorithm as implemented, by verifying the hypotheses of a known nonconvex block-coordinate convergence theorem against our objective and identifying which conditions come from this problem's structure. For the matrix-only sub-problem, we state a proven sampling bound from matrix completion theory. For the coupled problem, we prove a sample-complexity result for a sequential sub-case: a separately-known coupling operator recovers $M$ from $\mathcal{T}$'s recovery accuracy alone, with no observations of $M$ needed. For the fully joint, alternately-estimated case, we state a conjecture and test it empirically, including a low-density regime where coupling does not help. We report multi-seed synthetic experiments with mean and standard deviation across sampling densities, an asymmetric-density experiment, and convergence curves, and we explain why recovery error stays high at low density. We apply the framework to workforce-skill and small-business-health estimation. Every application-specific choice is a proposed design, not a validated result; we have not run the framework on deployed data.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: coupled low-rank tensor-matrix recovery method, directly relevant to tensor data recovery for hyperspectral images
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 耦合低秩张量矩阵恢复方法，直接相关于高光谱图像张量数据恢复
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 耦合低秩张量矩阵恢复方法，直接相关于高光谱图像张量数据恢复
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 耦合低秩张量矩阵恢复方法，直接相关于高光谱图像张量数据恢复
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a proximal alternating linearized minimization (PALM) algorithm for recovering a coupled low-rank tensor and matrix from sparse noisy observations, with convergence guarantees.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文研究了从稀疏噪声观测中恢复耦合低秩张量和矩阵的问题，其中张量和矩阵共享一个模态。通过使用张量展开的核范数松弛秩，并引入学习线性算子实现耦合，证明了目标函数最小解的存在性以及PALM算法收敛到临界点。该方法虽以劳动力技能估计为应用，但其数学框架完全适用于高光谱图像中张量数据恢复和去噪。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文研究了从稀疏噪声观测中恢复耦合低秩张量和矩阵的问题，其中张量和矩阵共享一个模态。通过使用张量展开的核范数松弛秩，并引入学习线性算子实现耦合，证明了目标函数最小解的存在性以及PALM算法收敛到临界点。该方法虽以劳动力技能估计为应用，但其数学框架完全适用于高光谱图像中张量数据恢复和去噪。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: high-dimensional tensor data recovery for hyperspectral images
